paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.32 as of July 23, 2026, representing a decrease of 3.95% from the prior close and a 20.9% decrease over the last 21 trading sessions.

There have been 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours, with headlines including "Draining the Ogallala Aquifer for AI? Project Matador and the myth of limitless growth" from Environment America and "Project Matador: World’s largest AI data center coming to Panhandle" from NewsChannel 10 on MSN, both of which discuss Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt private power and AI campus being built in the Texas Panhandle.

Fermi Inc. has filed several recent SEC filings, including the appointment of four new officers, the resignation of director Miles Everson, and the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, with total net proceeds of approximately $416.81 million. There has been 1 Form 4 filing and 3 new social posts in the last 24 hours.
